data.biography:
王希维，1986年4月25日出生于新疆乌鲁木齐市，毕业于中央戏剧学院，中国内地影视女演员、模特。

2003年，王希维因获得第9届中国模特之星大赛总冠军而出道 。2007年，出演个人的首部电影作品《离歌》。2010年，王希维出演了都市喜剧《丑女无敌》第四季；同年，她还参演了冯小刚执导的剧情片《非诚勿扰2》 。2013，王希维出演了励志剧《女人的武器》 。2014年，出演情感剧《幸福爱人》。
data.name: 王希维

data.biography:
王希維，1986 年 4 月 25 日出生於新疆烏魯木齊市，畢業於中央戲劇學院，中國內地影視女演員、模特。

2003 年，王希維因獲得第 9 屆中國模特之星大賽總冠軍而出道 。2007 年，出演個人的首部電影作品《離歌》。2010 年，王希維出演了都市喜劇《醜女無敵》第四季；同年，她還參演了馮小剛執導的劇情片《非誠勿擾 2》 。2013，王希維出演了勵志劇《女人的武器》 。2014 年，出演情感劇《幸福愛人》。
data.name: 王希維

data.biography: Robert Patrick Benedict (born September 21, 1970) is an American actor, writer and musician. He is best known for his work on the TV series Supernatural, Threshold, Felicity, and the comedy film Waiting.... He is also the lead singer/songwriter of the L.A.-based band Louden Swain.
data.name: Rob Benedict

data.biography:
Ronald G. Cook (born 1 December 1948) is an English actor. He has been active in film, television and theatre since the 1970s.

Cook was born in 1948 in South Shields, County Durham, the son of a school cook and a car worker. When he was 6, his family moved to Coventry; he went to Wyken Croft Junior School and then Caludon Castle School and is a graduate of Rose Bruford College.
data.name: Ron Cook

data.biography:
Laura Maori Tonke (* 14. April 1974 in West-Berlin) ist eine deutsche Schauspielerin. 

Laura Tonke ist die Tochter des Filmausstatters Michael Tonke. Sie studierte bis 1996 Theaterwissenschaften in Berlin. Im Alter von 17 Jahren gab sie ihr Debüt vor der Kamera in Michael Kliers Spielfilm Ostkreuz. Es folgten zahlreiche Rollen in Spiel- und Fernsehfilmen. Darüber hinaus wird sie auch in Szene- und Modemagazinen als Model gebucht. Seit dem Frühjahr 2007 steht sie bei Performance-Produktionen des Theaterkollektivs Gob Squad in der Berliner Volksbühne (bzw. Volksbühne im Prater) und anderen Theatern auf der Bühne.

Im Jahr 2000 wurde Tonke mit der Lilli-Palmer-Gedächtniskamera als Beste Nachwuchsschauspielerin ausgezeichnet. Für ihre Rolle der Gudrun Ensslin in Christopher Roths Spielfilm Baader wurde sie 2003 für den Deutschen Filmpreis nominiert.

In der Tragikomödie Hedi Schneider steckt fest von Sonja Heiss, die ihre Premiere auf der Berlinale 2015 feierte, spielt sie die von plötzlichen Angstzuständen heimgesuchte Titelfigur. Für ihre Darstellung erhielt sie begeisterte Kritiken, so schrieb Der Spiegel beispielsweise: „Die Rolle der Hedi Schneider füllt sie […] dermaßen überzeugend und passgenau aus, als sei sie ihr auf den Leib geschrieben.“

Bei der Verleihung des Deutschen Filmpreises 2016 wurde Tonke zweifach ausgezeichnet. Sie gewann sowohl in der Kategorie Beste weibliche Hauptrolle für ihre Rolle in Hedi Schneider steckt fest als auch den Preis als Beste weibliche Nebenrolle für den Film Mängelexemplar (2016).

Laura Tonke lebt in Berlin und hat einen Sohn.

Colby Daniel Lopez is an American professional wrestler, signed to WWE under the ring name Seth Rollins. He was one-third of the stable The Shield, former WWE Tag Team Champions with Shield member Roman Reigns, former WWE World Heavyweight Champion, and was the inaugural NXT Champion. Lopez previously performed under the ring name Tyler Black. Lopez also was a former FCW Florida Heavyweight Champion, FCW 15 Champion and FCW Florida Tag Team Champion with Richie Steamboat and is the first FCW Grand Slam Champion, the most decorated FCW star in its history. He first gained notoriety in Ring of Honor, where he is a former ROH World Champion. He has competed in Pro Wrestling Guerrilla (where he is a former World Tag Team Champion), Scott County Wrestling, AAW: Professional Wrestling Redefined, Independent Wrestling Association Mid-South, the National Wrestling Alliance, and Wrestling Society X. In several promotions, Black was the tag team partner of Jimmy Jacobs, with the team known as Doin' It For Her. He was once a member of The Age of the Fall along with Jacobs, and several other wrestlers.
data.name: Colby Lopez

data.biography:
Colby Daniel Lopez, 28 Mayıs 1986'da Buffalo, Iowa, ABD'de dünyaya gelmiştir. Profesyonel güreş dünyasında, neslinin en yetenekli ve en karizmatik süperstarlarından biri olarak kabul edilen Seth "Freakin'" Rollins ring adıyla tanınmaktadır. Güreş kariyerine WWE'ye katılmadan önce bağımsız güreş sahnesinde "Tyler Black" adıyla başlayan Lopez, burada Ring of Honor (ROH) Dünya Şampiyonluğu'nu kazanarak olağanüstü yeteneğini erken yaşta kanıtlamıştır.

2010 yılında WWE ile sözleşme imzaladıktan sonra, şirketin gelişim brand'i olan NXT'nin yeniden yapılanmasında kilit bir rol oynadı. Tarihe geçerek NXT'nin ilk şampiyonu oldu ve geleceğin ana etkinlik yıldızı olacağının sinyallerini verdi. Ancak onun ve güreş endüstrisinin seyrini değiştiren an, 2012 yılında Dean Ambrose (Jon Moxley) ve Roman Reigns ile birlikte ana kadroya "The Shield" adlı bir grup olarak yaptığı baskın oldu. The Shield, WWE tarihinin en dominant gruplarından biri haline geldi ve üç üyesini de süperstarlığa taşıdı.

Rollins, 2014'te gruba ihanet ederek kendi tekli kariyerini başlattı. "The Architect" (Mimar) lakabıyla The Authority'ye katılarak şirketin en nefret edilen kötü karakterlerinden birine dönüştü. Kariyerinin en belirleyici anını, WrestleMania 31'de Money in the Bank çantasını ana etkinlik sırasında kullanarak "Yüzyılın Soygunu" olarak anılan bir olayla WWE Dünya Ağırsiklet Şampiyonu olduğunda yaşadı. Bu olay, onu kalıcı olarak ana etkinlik seviyesine yerleştirdi.

Kariyeri boyunca sürekli kendini yenileyen Rollins, "The Kingslayer," "The Beastslayer" ve "Monday Night Messiah" gibi farklı karakterlere büründü. Son yıllarda ise abartılı moda anlayışı, eksantrik tavırları ve seyircinin hep bir ağızdan söylediği tema müziğiyle tanınan "The Visionary" karakteriyle büyük bir popülerlik yakaladı. Çok sayıda dünya şampiyonluğu kazanan, bir Grand Slam Şampiyonu olan Rollins, aynı zamanda 2023'te yeniden tanıtılan Dünya Ağırsiklet Şampiyonluğu'nun da ilk sahibi olmuştur.

Temmuz 2025 itibarıyla, geçirdiği ciddi sakatlıkların ardından ringlere dönmüş olan Seth Rollins, WWE'nin en önemli temel taşlarından ve en popüler figürlerinden biri olarak kabul edilmektedir. Olağanüstü ring içi yeteneği, karakterini sürekli yeniden icat etme becerisi ve güreşin en başarılı gruplarından birindeki rolüyle modern dönemin en etkili güreşçileri arasındaki yerini sağlamlaştırmıştır.

Ayo Edebiri (/ˈaɪoʊ əˈdɛbəri/ Eye-oh ə-DEB-ər-ee; born October 3, 1995) is an American actress, comedian, and television writer. Since 2022, she has played chef Sydney Adamu in the comedy-drama series The Bear, for which she won a Golden Globe Award, a Screen Actors Guild Award, and a Primetime Emmy Award, as well as a nomination for a Directors Guild of America Award for directing the episode "Napkins".

Edebiri has been a writer and voice actor on Big Mouth since 2020 and was a writer for the comedy series What We Do in the Shadows in 2022. In 2023, she voiced roles in Spider-Man: Across the Spider-Verse and Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles: Mutant Mayhem and starred in the Theater Camp and Bottoms comedies. She had another voice role in Inside Out 2 (2024).

Description above from the Wikipedia article Ayo Edebiri, licensed under CC-BY-SA, full list of contributors on Wikipedia.
data.name: Ayo Edebiri
アイオウ・エディバリー

data.biography:
Ayo Edebiri (/ˈaɪoʊ əˈdɛbəri/ Eye-oh ə-DEB-ər-ee; ur. 3 października 1995) jest amerykańską aktorką, komikiem i scenarzystką telewizyjną. Od 2022 roku grała szefową kuchni Sydney Adamu w serialu komediodramatycznym The Bear, za który otrzymała nagrodę Złotego Globu, nagrodę Screen Actors Guild Award i nagrodę Primetime Emmy, a także nominację do nagrody Directors Guild of America Award za reżyserię odcinka „Napkins”.

Edebiri jest pisarką i aktorką głosową w Big Mouth od 2020 roku i była pisarką w serialu komediowym Co robimy w ukryciu w 2022 roku. W 2023 roku użyczyła głosu w Spider-Man: Poprzez multiwersum i Wojownicze Żółwie Ninja: Zmutowany chaos i zagrała w komediach Obóz teatralny i Na dnie. Miała inną rolę głosową w W głowie się nie mieści 2 (2024).

Opis powyżej pochodzi z artykułu Wikipedii Ayo Edebiri, licencjonowanego na podstawie CC-BY-SA, pełna lista współpracowników na Wikipedii.

data.biography:
Daniel Edward Aykroyd, born in Ottawa, initially pursued studies in psychology, criminal sociology, and political science at Carleton University, where his comedy journey took off. He co-wrote sketches for a private cable company, igniting his passion for acting. At 20, he joined The Second City comedy troupe in Chicago and Toronto, marking the start of his career.

In 1975, Aykroyd joined "Saturday Night Live" as a founding member of the "Not Ready For Prime Time Players," crafting iconic sketches like "The Blues Brothers" with Belushi and "Two Wild and Crazy Guys" with Steve Martin. The success of "The Blues Brothers" sketch led to a full-length feature in 1980, with Aykroyd writing and producing the movie soundtrack, defying the disco and punk era.

His versatile talent shines in roles like Dr. Ray Stantz in "Ghostbusters," Jessica Tandy’s son in "Driving Miss Daisy," a single father in "My Girl," and an assassin in "Grosse Pointe Blank," showcasing both comedic and dramatic prowess.
data.name: Dan Aykroyd

data.biography:
Daniel Edward Aykroyd, CM (* 1. Juli 1952 in Ottawa) ist ein kanadischer Filmschauspieler, Drehbuchautor und Sänger. International bekannt wurde er in den 1980er-Jahren durch Komödien wie Blues Brothers und Ghostbusters – Die Geisterjäger.

Quelle: Wikipedia

Dan Aykroyd 1952. július 1-én született Ottawában, Kanadában. Édesapja a kanadai miniszterelnök, Pierre Trudeau tanácsadója volt. 17 éves koráig Aykroyd papi hivatásra készült, majd kriminológiai és szociológiai tanulmányokat követően kanadai klubokban lépett fel komikusként, de a blues-szcénában is otthonosan mozgott. Egy éjszaka Muddy Watersnek szüksége volt egy dobosra, Aykroyd pedig készségesen beszállt a jammelésbe.

A ’70-es években a Second City nevű komikuscsapat tagjaként kereste kenyerét, többnyire Torontóban és Chicagóban léptek fel. Széleskörű népszerűségre a Saturday Night Live-nak köszönhetően tett szert, melynek írója és szereplője is volt a műsor első négy évadában, 1975-79 között. Nagyszerűen utánozta és parodizálta kora sztárjait és politikusait. 1977-ben írói munkájáért Emmy-díjat kapott.

John Belushival közösen alapították meg a Blues Brotherst, majd profi zenészekkel kiegészülve léptek fel a SNL-ben, jellegzetes fekete napszemüvegeikben. A kultuszfilmmé váló Blues Brothers 1980-ban készült el, az együttes pedig a mai napig aktív.

Aykroyd ezenkívül a Szellemirtók franchsie írójaként is ismert, melynek mindkét részében (1984 és 1989) Bill Murray és Sigourney Weaver oldalán láthattuk. Rendezőként 1991-ben debütált az Eszelős szívatással, mely azonban lehangoló kritikai fogadtatásban részesült. Színészként láthattuk még az 1992-es Chaplinben, hallhattuk Maci Laci hangjaként (Maci Laci –  2010), legutóbb pedig Steven Soderbergh Túl a csillogáson (2013) című alkotásában tűnt fel.  Feleségével, a színésznő Donna Dixonnal 1983-ban házasodtak össze, három gyermekük született, Danielle, Stella és Belle.

Daniel Edward Aykroyd, né le 1er juillet 1952 est un acteur, producteur, comédien, musicien et cinéaste canadien qui a été un membre original de l'émission Saturday Night Live (1975-1979). Un sketch musical qu'il a joué avec John Belushi sur SNL, les Blues Brothers, s'est transformé en un véritable groupe de scène, puis en film The Blues Brothers en 1980.

Il a conçu et joué dans Ghostbusters (1984), qui a donné naissance à une suite et finalement à une franchise médiatique complète. En 1990, il a été nominé pour l'Oscar du meilleur acteur de soutien pour son travail dans le film Driving Miss Daisy (1989). Il a joué dans sa propre sitcom, Soul Man (1997-1998). Aykroyd est également un homme d'affaires, ayant cofondé la chaîne de salles de musique House of Blues et la marque de vodka Crystal Head.

Daniel Edward Aykroyd (1 de julio de 1952), es un escritor, actor, cómico, cantante y guionista de cine canadiense. Conocido por sus actuaciones en el dúo musical The Blues Brothers (Los hermanos del Blues), junto al comediante estadounidense John Belushi.

Dan Aykroyd jest obecnie jednym z najpopularniejszych komików na świecie. Niewiele osób wie jednak, iż pierwotnie planował zostać księdzem. Wstąpił nawet do seminarium duchownego, z którego "na szczęście" go wyrzucono. Rozpoczął wtedy naukę na Uniwersytecie Carleton w Ottawie, gdzie studiował psychologię, nauki polityczne i socjologię kryminalną. Tam też rozpoczęła się jego przygoda z aktorstwem. Wstąpił do uniwersyteckiej grupy teatralnej "Sock'n'Buskin", z którą występował przez cały okres edukacji. Po opuszczeniu murów uczelni Aykroyd przyłączył się do bardzo popularnej trupy "Second City Comedy", gdzie występował, pisał skecze, a także reżyserował niektóre przedstawienia. W tym czasie poznał amerykańskiego komika Johna Belushi, który zaproponował Aykroydowi udział w programie "Saturday Night Live". 11 października 1975 r. stacja NBC wyemitowała debiutancki odcinek programu, który niemalże natychmiast stał się przebojem, a z jego autorów uczynił gwiazdy. W 1980 r. Aykroyd i Belushi zagrali w filmie, który przyniósł im największą sławę: "Blues Brothers". Niestety ten okres ich pracy ma również swoje ciemne strony. W owym czasie Belushi był już bowiem uzależniony od narkotyków, które dwa lata później zakończyły jego życie. Po śmierci przyjaciela Aykroyd opuścił grupę tworzącą "Saturday Night Live" i zajął się tworzeniem filmów na duży ekran. W tej dziedzinie również osiągnął spore sukcesy. Ma na swoim koncie takie filmowe przeboje jak: "Nieoczekiwana zmiana miejsc", "Pogromcy duchów" czy "Szpiedzy tacy jak my". W 1989 r. Aykroyd zadebiutował rolą dramatyczną w filmie "Wożąc panią Daisy", za którą otrzymał nominację do Oscara. W 1997 r. aktor powrócił do telewizji realizując serial komediowy "Dusza człowiek".

Daniel Edward "Dan" Aykroyd, (Ottawa, 1 de julho de 1952) é um ator, comediante, roteirista, músico, vinicultor e ufólogo canadense. Indicado para o Oscar e vencedor do Emmy, foi um dos membros originais do lendário programa de comédia Saturday Night Live, um dos criadores dos Blues Brothers (com John Belushi) e Ghostbusters, e tem uma longa carreira como ator e roteirista de cinema. Em 1990 foi indicado ao Oscar de Melhor Ator Coadjuvante pelo filme Driving Miss Daisy. Além de ser um grande ator, Aykroyd também é empreendedor, ele tinha um bar, logo depois co-fundou a "House of Blues" em 1992.

丹·艾克罗伊德（Dan Aykroyd），生于1952年7月1日，加拿大演员。

1975年与谐星吉维蔡斯、比尔墨瑞共同参与著名的深夜电视综艺节目《周末夜现场》，并大受欢迎而演出长达四年之久。其银幕处女作为《1941》，接下来的《福禄双霸天》为其建立了知名度，84年参与编剧并主演的《捉鬼敢死队》更将他捧为喜剧巨星。89年演出的《温馨接送情》不但在奥斯卡大放异彩，他个人也凭该片入围最佳男配角奖。1994年，他的母校授予他荣誉博士学位。近年仍演出不断。
data.name: 丹·艾克罗伊德

data.biography:
丹·艾克洛德（Dan Aykroyd），生於 1952 年 7 月 1 日，加拿大演員。

1975 年與諧星吉維蔡斯、比爾墨瑞共同參與著名的深夜電視綜藝節目《週末夜現場》，並大受歡迎而演出長達四年之久。其銀幕處女作為《1941》，接下來的《福祿雙霸天》為其建立了知名度，84 年參與編劇並主演的《捉鬼敢死隊》更將他捧為喜劇巨星。89 年演出的《温馨接送情》不但在奧斯卡大放異彩，他個人也憑該片入圍最佳男配角獎。1994 年，他的母校授豫他榮譽博士學位。近年仍演出不斷。
data.name: 丹·艾克洛德

data.biography:
Daniel Edward Aykroyd, nato a Ottawa, inizialmente ha studiato psicologia, sociologia criminale e scienze politiche alla Carleton University, dove il suo percorso comico è decollato. Co-scriveva sketch per una compagnia privata di cavo, accendendo la sua passione per la recitazione. A 20 anni, si unì alla compagnia comica The Second City a Chicago e Toronto, segnando l'inizio della sua carriera.

Nel 1975, Aykroyd entrò a far parte di "Saturday Night Live" come membro fondatore dei "Not Ready For Prime Time Players", creando sketch iconici come "The Blues Brothers" con Belushi e "Two Wild and Crazy Guys" con Steve Martin. Il successo dello sketch "The Blues Brothers" portò a un lungometraggio nel 1980, con Aykroyd che scriveva e produceva la colonna sonora del film, sfidando l'era disco e punk.

Il suo talento versatile brilla in ruoli come il dottor Ray Stantz in "Ghostbusters", il figlio di Jessica Tandy in "Driving Miss Daisy", un padre single in "My Girl" e un assassino in "Grosse Pointe Blank", mostrando sia abilità comiche che drammatiche.
草爷（1988年4月23日—），本名为江治纬，台湾男艺人、歌手、演员、YouTuber，出生于高雄县，目前居住于南投县。2017年5月5日和友人创立含羞草日记，2020年4月17日于南投县成立合情合理工作室。
data.name: 草爷

data.biography: 草爺（1988 年 4 月 23 日—），本名為江治緯，台灣男藝人、歌手、演員、YouTuber，出生於高雄縣，目前居住於南投縣。2017 年 5 月 5 日和友人創立含羞草日記，2020 年 4 月 17 日於南投縣成立合情合理工作室。
data.name: 草爺

data.biography:
Enuka Vanessa Okuma is a Canadian actress, writer and director, best known for her role as detective Traci Nash in the Global/ABC police drama series, Rookie Blue (2010–2015).

Okuma is also known for her work on the Canadian television series Madison (1994–1998) and Sue Thomas: F.B.Eye (2002–2005). She appeared in the first season of TV soap opera Hillside as the scheming and conspiring Kelly.

Okuma made her directorial debut with the short film, Cookie, on which she was also a writer, actor, and executive producer. She has since expanded into writing for television.

Description above from the Wikipedia article Enuka Okuma, licensed under CC-BY-SA, full list of contributors on Wikipedia.
data.name: Enuka Okuma

data.biography: ist ein Irish kanadischen Film , Fernsehen und Bühne Schauspieler , am besten bekannt für seine Rolle als irische Einwanderer Mickey McGinnes auf der AMC - Fernsehserie , Hell on Wheels .  Er erschien 2015 im Film Dirty Weekend . Er hat auch eine komödiantische Rolle als gedankenloser, unglücklicher Ehemann namens "Dual-Bag" in einer Reihe von Fernsehwerbespots mit dem Titel "The Doghouse" für den Einzelhändler JC Penney gespielt.

data.biography:
1990年陈秀雯复出电视圈为TVB拍剧，《自梳女》、《人海骄阳》都取得了不俗收视，之后的《壹号

　　皇庭》系列和《再见亦是老婆》则彻底奠定了她在90年代中期的TVB一姐地位，连续几年入选十大最受欢迎电视艺人，尤其《再》中有点懦弱、有点罗索的肥师奶形象深入人心，让她成为当年最受观众欢迎的电视艺人，更被称为女版“师奶杀手”，由此可见当年她的受欢迎程度。

　　96年陈秀雯过档亚视拍《再见艳阳天》，收视依然高企，并继续入围十大最受欢迎电视艺人，在TVB一台独大的香港电视圈算是个不大不小的奇迹。
data.name: 陈秀雯

data.biography:
1990 年陳秀雯復出電視圈為 TVB 拍劇，《自梳女》、《人海驕陽》都取得了不俗收視，之後的《壹號

皇庭》系列和《再見亦是老婆》則徹底奠定了她在 90 年代中期的 TVB 一姐地位，聯續幾年入選十大最受歡迎電視藝人，尤其《再》中有點懦弱、有點羅索的肥師奶形象深入人心，讓她成為當年最受觀眾歡迎的電視藝人，更被稱為女版“師奶殺手”，由此可見當年她的受歡迎程度。

96 年陳秀雯過檔亞視拍《再見豔陽天》，收視依然高企，並繼續入圍十大最受歡迎電視藝人，在 TVB 一台獨大的香港電視圈算是個不大不小的奇跡。
data.name: 陳秀雯

data.biography: Mitsuki Takahata is a Japanese actress & singer who is represented by the talent agency Horipro. She is from Higashiosaka, Osaka, Japan and attended Tokyo's Hosei University. She made her way onto the small screen in 2007, silver screen in 2013 and a win at the 40th Japan Academy Prize as Newcomer Of The Year in 2017. She has appeared in several videos, released her own album through Warner Music Japan and advertised for Panasonic, Glico and other corporate entities. She is signed to Horipro Talent Agency. She was the Japanese Voice Actress of Cinderella (Disney's Cinderella, 2015).
data.name: Mitsuki Takahata

data.biography: 谭倩红（英语：Tam Sin Hung，1931年8月28日—），原名谭丽荷，香港前资深影视女演员、粤剧名伶，曾为无线电视及亚洲电视旗下艺人。
data.name: 谭倩红

data.biography:
譚倩紅，原名譚麗荷，香港前資深影視女演員、粵劇名伶，曾為無綫電視及亞洲電視旗下藝人。

她拜京劇名師粉菊花及吳惜衣的徒弟。譚倩紅為「花旦皇」芳艷芬的副車 5 年，公認是勤力及易於相處。由鄧碧雲引薦及後經任劍輝在 1944 年進入粵劇行業，經周詩祿導演引薦接拍銀幕處女作《恨海芳魂》（1953 年）。1961 年與任冰兒、朱日紅、金影憐、許卿卿、黎坤蓮、英麗梨、李香琴及梁素琴，義結金蘭姐妹，組成九大姐。至 1970 年為了照顧女兒選擇息影。至 1987 年復出，年青時的角色多屬風騷艷婦或刁蠻十三點小姐，共參演約 160 齣電影。

1990 年底，加入香港無綫電視演出，曾參與多部經典處境劇演出，包括《茶煲世家》、《朝陽》以及與李司棋、薛家燕、樓南光、黎宣及關海山等人合作的《真情》，直到 2001 年尾約滿離開無綫後為止，結束 11 年賓主關係。

2001 年，轉投亞洲電視，參與拍攝《親子情未了》、《有求必應》、《萬家燈火》及《媽媽我真的愛你》等經典電視劇集，至 2004 年，結束 3 年賓主關係並淡出影視圈。
data.name: 譚倩紅

data.biography: Quiz ser atriz depois de ver seus avós gostando de assistir dramas diários e querendo fazê-los felizes.

Peyton Williams Manning (born March 24, 1976) is an American former professional football quarterback who played in the National Football League (NFL) for 18 seasons. Nicknamed "the Sheriff", he spent 14 seasons with the Indianapolis Colts and four with the Denver Broncos. Manning is considered one of the greatest quarterbacks of all time. A member of the Manning football dynasty, he is the second son of former NFL quarterback Archie Manning, older brother of former NFL quarterback Eli Manning, and uncle of Texas Longhorns quarterback Arch Manning. He played college football for the Tennessee Volunteers, winning the Maxwell, Davey O'Brien, and Johnny Unitas Golden Arm awards as a senior en route to victory in the 1997 SEC Championship Game.

The Colts selected Manning first overall in the 1998 NFL draft and served as their starting quarterback from 1998 to 2010. He helped transform the struggling Colts franchise into consistent playoff contenders, leading them to 11 playoff appearances, eight division titles, three AFC Championship Games, two Super Bowl appearances, and one championship title in Super Bowl XLI, the franchise's first in over three decades and first since relocating to Indianapolis. Manning was also named Super Bowl MVP in the victory. After undergoing neck surgery that sidelined him for the 2011 season, Manning was released by the Colts and signed with the Broncos. Serving as the Broncos starting quarterback from 2012 to 2015, he helped them clinch their division each season and reach two Super Bowls. Manning's career ended with a victory in Super Bowl 50, making him the first starting quarterback to win the Super Bowl for more than one franchise.

Manning holds many NFL records, including most MVP awards,[16] quarterback first-team All-Pro selections, 4,000-yard passing seasons, single-season passing yards, and single-season passing touchdowns. He is also third in career passing yards and career passing touchdowns. Helping lead both the Colts and Broncos to two Super Bowls each, Manning is the only quarterback to have reached the Super Bowl with multiple franchises and multiple starts for each. He was inducted into the College Football Hall of Fame in 2017 and the Pro Football Hall of Fame in 2021.

Description above from the Wikipedia article Chloe Radcliffe, licensed under CC-BY-SA, full list of contributors on Wikipedia.
data.name: Peyton Manning

data.biography: Zhang Yue is a Chinese singer and actress, born in Beijing, China. She debuted in 2017 as a member of 'Youwo' girl group. In 2018 she debuted as an actress in the fantasy action film "God Emperor Yutian." She is currently under her own studio named Zhang Yue Studio. In 2020, she became well known for her role as 'Lin You You' in the TV series "Thirty Only". She graduated from Beijing Dance Academy.
data.name: Zhang Yue

data.biography:
张月，YueZhang，1994年9月14日出生于北京市，中国内地女演员、歌手，女子演唱团体优我女团成员。

2017年4月，张月参加浙江卫视女团养成真人秀节目《天生是优我》 。6月，以团体“优我女团”成员的身份出道。2018年1月，随团体参加央视互动类综艺节目《我要上春晚》。5月，随团体发行首张专辑《优Show》。7月，主演年代剧情片《那年1987》。

2020年7月，张月参演的都市情感剧《三十而已》在东方卫视首播，因饰演“林有有”一角而受到关注。2020年8月，加盟明星跨界音乐真人秀节目《跨界歌王第五季》；随后，主演的奇幻爱情片《大梦聊斋》上映 ；11月10日，领衔主演的近代革命剧《宿命之敌》开机。2021年3月11日，《祝卿好》开机，张月饰演女二号徐时锦。
data.name: 张月

data.biography: Trương Nguyệt (14/9/1994) là "gương mặt vàng trong làng nữ phụ", thường xuyên xuất hiện hỗ trợ cho các nhân vật nữ chính. Chắc khán giả vẫn chưa quên Lâm Hữu Hữu trong 30 Chưa Phải Là Hết, Tống Giai Âm trong Quốc Tử Giám Có Một Nữ Đệ Tử, Từ Thời Cẩm trong Chúc Khanh Hảo, Vạn Thê Thê trong Tinh Hà Xán Lạn... đều là do cô nàng thể hiện.
data.name: Trương Nguyệt

data.biography:
張月，YueZhang，1994 年 9 月 14 日出生於北京市，中國內地女演員、歌手，女子演唱團體優我女團成員。

2017 年 4 月，張月參加浙江衞視女團養成真人秀節目《天生是優我》 。6 月，以團體“優我女團”成員的身份出道。2018 年 1 月，隨團體參加央視互動類綜藝節目《我要上春晚》。5 月，隨團體發行首張專輯《優 Show》。7 月，主演年代劇情片《那年 1987》。

2020 年 7 月，張月參演的都市情感劇《三十而已》在東方衞視首播，因飾演“林有有”一角而受到關注。2020 年 8 月，加盟明星跨界音樂真人秀節目《跨界歌王第五季》；隨後，主演的奇幻愛情片《大夢聊齋》上映 ；11 月 10 日，領銜主演的近代革命劇《宿命之敵》開機。2021 年 3 月 11 日，《祝卿好》開機，張月飾演女二號徐時錦。
data.name: 張月

data.biography:
Apasiri Nitibhon, nicknamed Um, is a Thai supermodel and actress. She is the younger sister of Amarin Nitibhon, a Thai singer and actor. She entered the entertainment industry by becoming a model at the age of 18 after the 'Trend Setter' contest. Likewise, Apasiri then took photoshoots for magazines and became well known in the modeling industry in the 1990s with a unique face and 173 centimeters tall.

She began her acting career at the age of 25 by taking part in the film 'Sunset at Chaopraya' in 1995, starring as 'Angsumalin'.  Apasiri trained as a likay dancer in her youth. For the 2006 film, 'The Victim', she portrayed a beauty queen who performs a likay dance. For this role, she had to receive a refresher course in Thai classical dance.
data.name: Apasiri Nitibhon

data.biography:
Rashmika Ellora Torchia is a British actress. For her role in the film In the Earth (2021), she was nominated for a British Independent Film Award. Her other films include Les Cowboys (2015), Midsommar (2019), and Ali & Ava (2021).

She was named a 2021 Screen International Star of Tomorrow and a BAFTA Breakthrough Brit.
data.name: Ellora Torchia

data.biography:
Rashmika Ellora Torchia jest brytyjską aktorką. Za rolę w filmie Na Ziemi (2021) została nominowana do British Independent Film Award. Jej inne filmy to Les Cowboys (2015), Midsommar. W biały dzień(2019) i Ali & Ava (2021).

Została nazwana Screen International Star of Tomorrow 2021 i BAFTA Breakthrough Brit.
Huub Stapel ist ein niederländischer Schauspieler, der vornehmlich in seiner Heimat, aber auch in Deutschland, durch Kino- und Fernseh-Produktionen bekannt wurde.
